display_flower_workers(flower_api_url)[source]

Retrieve and display worker information from the Flower API with color styling.

Parameters:

flower_api_url (str) – The URL of the Flower API.

Returns:

None

get_flower_workers(flower_api_url)[source]

Retrieve worker information from the Flower API.

Parameters:

flower_api_url (str) – The URL of the Flower API.

Returns:

A dictionary containing worker information if successful, None otherwise.

Return type:

dict or None

Bases: object

__init__(db_internal)[source]

Initialize the ProcessingStatus class, setting up the database accessor and retrieving cases.

delete_handler_task(case_uuid)[source]
display_ongoing_tasks(selected_case_name)[source]

Display a single table containing data from all DB tables except ‘master_status’ and ‘case_snapshot’, filtered to display only rows where the column ‘processing_status’ does not contain ‘processing_done’.

Parameters:

  • selected_case_name (str) – The name of the selected case.

  • filter_string (str) – The string to filter rows by.

Returns:

None
